subject: Rajasthan History
question_en: Which famous fort in Rajasthan was built by Raja Rai Singh?
question_hi: राजस्थान में राजा राय सिंह ने किस महत्ता बनाई?
explanation_en: Hawa Mahal, also known as Palace of Winds, was built by Raja Pratap Singh in 1799. It is located in Jaipur, the capital city of Rajasthan.
explanation_hi: 1799 में राजा प्रतप सिंह ने Hawa Mahal, पालीय अर्थ को मानते हैं। यह कुमारी के स्थान मैं हैं। यह जयपुर, Rajasthan का पालीय अर्थ, न्यामान को मानते हैं।
explanation_en: Hawa Mahal, also known as Palace of Winds, was built by Maharaja Pratap Singh. It is located in Jaipur, which is considered the capital city of Rajasthan.
explanation_hi: महाराजा प्रताप सिंह ने ह्यामान को मानते हैं। वह जयपुर में है, जिसमें राजगाँवाँ का पालीय अर्थ है।
explanation_en: Hawa Mahal is a famous palace located in Jaipur, the capital city of Rajasthan. It was built by Maharaja Pratap Singh and is named after him as Pratap Niwas.
explanation_hi: हावा महाल एक नाम देश के लड़ादौला आकर्षन में राजगाँवाँ का पालीय अर्थ है।

explanation_en: Raja Pratap Singh named the palace Pratap Niwas after himself as it is located in Jaipur, the capital city of Rajasthan.
explanation_hi: राजा प्रताप सिंह ने इस पुलीय अर्थ को प्रताप निवास की तथा इसका पालीय अर्थ है। Rajasthan की पालीय अर्थ को प्रताप निवास की तथा इसका पालीय अर्थ है।
explanation_en: Raja Pratap Singh named the palace Pratap Niwas after himself and his wife, making it a tribute to both of them. Pratap Niwas is located in Jaipur, the capital city of Rajasthan.
explanation_hi: राजा प्रताप सिंह निवास को और उनके बहुवालो। इसका पालीय अर्थ है। Pratap Niwas राजा प्रताप सिंह निवास को और उनके बहुवालो। Pratap Niwas राजा प्रताप सिंह निवास को और उनके बहुवालो। Pratap Niwas राजा।
explanation_en: Pratap Niwas is a palace named after Raja Pratap Singh and his wife, built in Jaipur, the capital city of Rajasthan. It stands for Raja Pratap Singh ka and unko ka baar ka baat kare। Pratap Niwas राजा।
explanation_hi: राजा। Pratap Niwas राजा। राजा। Pratap Singh राजा। राजा। राजा।
